configFormat:
{
  "name": "CompanyName",
  "goal": "Goal title",
  "goalDescription": "One paragraph goal description",
  "project": "Project name",
  "projectDescription": "Brief project description",
  "preset": "preset-name",
  "modules": ["all-modules-including-preset"],
  "roles": ["extra-role-a"],
  "explanation": "2-3 sentences explaining WHY this configuration fits the described company — what the chosen preset, modules, and roles enable and how they work together."
}
